hero.headline: 41 Years Shaping the Hudson Valley
hero.subheadline: Since 1985, Red Cedar Landscapes has been the trusted partner for homeowners and businesses across Dutchess County. From landscape design and tree care to hardscaping and snow management, our certified professionals handle it all so you can enjoy your property year-round.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Landscape Solutions for<br class="hidden md:block"> Every Season
services.subtitle: From spring planting to winter snow management, Red Cedar delivers year-round care for your property. Our certified team brings four decades of Hudson Valley knowledge to every project.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom outdoor living spaces including patios, pergolas, fire pits, and gardens — designed and built by our experienced team to transform your vision into reality.

cards.title: Tree Service & Arborist Care
cards.description: ISA Certified Arborist services for tree removal, pruning, disease management, and emergency response. Your trees are in the most qualified hands in the Hudson Valley.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Stonework
cards.description: Expert installation of retaining walls, patios, walkways, and stone features that add lasting beauty, structure, and value to your property.

cards.title: Excavating & Land Clearing
cards.description: Professional site preparation, land clearing, and brush removal for residential and commercial projects — done safely with the right equipment.

cards.title: Commercial Property Management
cards.description: Year-round landscape maintenance for businesses, HOAs, and commercial properties including mowing, fertilization, pest control, and seasonal care.

cards.title: Snow Management
cards.description: Reliable commercial snow plowing, salting, and ice removal that keeps your business accessible and safe through every Hudson Valley winter.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. We'll visit your site, listen carefully, and provide an honest assessment and detailed proposal — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Execute
steps.description: Our certified professionals handle every detail — from design plans and material sourcing to expert installation. We keep you informed at every stage of the project.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property
steps.description: Step outside into a landscape that looks stunning in every season. With optional ongoing maintenance, your investment stays beautiful for decades to come.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Red Cedar
about.headline: Four Decades of Roots in This Community
about.description: Founded in 1985 by Steven Relyea, Red Cedar Landscapes has grown from a small local operation into one of the Hudson Valley's most respected landscape contractors. Our team of 9 professionals brings ISA Certified Arborist credentials, a Certified Treecare Safety Professional designation, and a genuine passion for working with the natural ecosystems of this region. We hold an A+ BBB rating and a Best of Houzz award because we treat every property — and every client — like family.

features.title: Certified & Insured Professionals
features.description: Every crew member is trained, insured, and led by ISA Certified Arborists and Certified Treecare Safety Professionals.

features.title: Full-Service with On-Site Nursery
features.description: We source plants, trees, mulch, and stone from our own supply yard — better quality, better prices, faster turnaround.

features.title: Environmentally Conscious Approach
features.description: We work with the natural ecosystems of the Hudson Valley, not against them. Sustainable practices guide every project we take on.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Honest Estimates.
pricing.subtitle: Every property is unique, so we provide custom proposals after a free on-site consultation. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — ever.

guarantee.headline: Our "Red Cedar Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we will return to make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation over 41 years on standing behind our work — your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is the foundation of our business.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start a new project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope and season. For emergency tree services, we offer next-day response. Call us and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve homeowners, businesses, HOAs, and municipalities across the Hudson Valley. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management and flexible scheduling to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Are your arborists actually certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. We employ ISA Certified Arborists and Certified Treecare Safety Professionals. These are nationally recognized credentials that require ongoing education and testing — not just a business card title.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Hudson Valley including Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, and Columbia counties in New York, and Fairfield County in Connecticut. Our primary service area covers Wappingers Falls, Poughkeepsie, Beacon, Fishkill, Hyde Park, Rhinebeck, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after a project is completed?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer comprehensive landscape maintenance programs to protect your investment year-round. From seasonal cleanups and mowing to fertilization and snow management, we keep your property looking its best in every season.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded our backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve some grading and slope challenges that other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Residential Client
testimonials.text: I was extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. The workers were courteous, professional, creative, and they did what they could to meet my needs at all times.

testimonials.name: Property Owner
testimonials.text: They were on time, did great work, were very clean and took all debris with them. Red Cedar responded to our emergency tree removal request the very next morning at 7:30am and the tree was gone within an hour. Definitely recommend.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from the Hudson Valley's most trusted landscape team. 41 years of experience, one phone call away.
